name: openharness-official
description: Official openHarness plugin marketplace — curated tools, workflows, and integrations

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Automated code quality checks — linting, complexity analysis, dead code detection
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: git-workflows
plugins.description: Git automation — conventional commits, changelog generation, release management
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: test-coverage
plugins.description: Test coverage analysis — find untested code, suggest test cases, track coverage trends
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: api-client
plugins.description: REST/GraphQL API tools — request builder, response validation, mock server
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: docker-tools
plugins.description: Docker automation — build, run, compose, inspect containers and images
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: database-tools
plugins.description: Database operations — schema inspection, migration generation, query building
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: docs-generator
plugins.description: Auto-generate API docs, README sections, and JSDoc/TSDoc from code
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: performance
plugins.description: Performance profiling — find slow functions, bundle size analysis, memory leaks
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: security-scan
plugins.description: Security scanning — dependency audit, secret detection, SAST analysis
plugins.author: openharness

plugins.name: monorepo
plugins.description: Monorepo tools — workspace management, dependency graphs, affected package detection
plugins.author: openharness
